message:
docs(mysql): Add warnings about uncommitted transaction behavior

- Add warning documentation to SharedMySqlTransaction about the need to
  explicitly call commit() or rollback() before dropping
- Add debug_assertions warning in Drop impl to help developers catch
  transactions that were dropped without being finalized
- This is a common async limitation since Drop cannot perform async work

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
